---
title: "Advanced"
page-layout: full
---

## Advanced Hub

Route into advanced model architecture and tuning pages.

- [Model umbrella](model-umbrella.qmd)
- [Customization and tuning](customization-and-tuning.qmd)
- [GPD-in-DPM architecture](gpd-in-dpm-architecture.qmd)

## Related links

- [Kernels hub](../kernels.qmd)
- [Start backends and workflow](../start/backends-and-workflow.qmd)
- [pkgdown reference](../pkgdown/reference/index.html)
